creator: sfarrell@healthquiz.com
text:
xforms port is broken.  i think i sent some patches to the maintainer
about 6 months ago.  it is still broken.

Fix: 

the dist of this has changed, though the version number has not,
unfortunately.  obviously the checksum fails to match.  additionally,
iirc, the patches don't work and, actually, the author appears to
have attempted to make it build better under BSD, but it doesn't
appear to work completely.
How-To-Repeat: 
cd /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/xforms; make
